description: Per-modality observation within a scan session. G2 STRUCTURAL: encryptedPayloadCid REQUIRED (raw + derived features held encrypted). G10: modalityId MUST exist in modalityCapability ledger. G9 (ALARA): ionizing modalities NEVER emit a routine-pod observation (referral-to-licensed-facility only). Aggregate public fields ONLY.

modalityId.description: G10 REQUIRED: must resolve to a modalityCapability ledger entry with declared evidenceGrade + regulatoryClass

encryptedPayloadCid.description: G2 REQUIRED: encrypted envelope CID containing raw + derived features. Plaintext rejected.

captureQuality.description: Coarse quality flag; no biometric values

regulatedModalityClearanceCid.description: G4: if modalityId is regulated (R3-gated), the licensed-medical-device-pathway clearance CID; absence rejects regulated modalities pre-R3
